rulings.Case Title: EZIO GAGLIARDI VS. NOELLE LEMAITRE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Judgment For Enforcement Of Terms Of The Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, January 14, 2009, line 14, DEFENDANTS NOELLE LEMAITRE AND CURRON MITCHELL'S Motion For Judgment For Enforcement Of Terms Of The Settlement IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT ENTERED JUDGMENT ON DECEMBER 2, 2008. THUS, THE COURT LACKS JURISDICTION TO RECONSIDER ITS EX PARTE ORDER. SEE RAMON V. AEROSPACE CORP., (1996) 50 CAL.APP.4TH 1233, 1236. ADDITIONALLY, THE COURT CANNOT ENTER A SECOND JUDGMENT IN DEFENDANT'S FAVOR. DEFENDANT'S REMEDY IS TO VACATE THE EXISTING JUDGMENT PER CCP 473 OR SEEK A NEW TRIAL PER CCP 657. =(302/PHA/PB)

ADDITIONALLY, THE COURT CANNOT ENTER A SECOND JUDGMENT IN DEFENDANT'S FAVOR. DEFENDANT'S REMEDY IS TO VACATE THE EXISTING JUDGMENT PER CCP 473 OR SEEK A NEW TRIAL PER CCP 657. =(302/PHA/PB)
